message:
fix(mesh,sandbox): improve decode panic message and IPv6 CIDR normalization

- degraded.rs: add descriptive expect() message to pending reconstruction
  removal (defense-in-depth for unreachable path)
- egress.rs: use to_ipv4() instead of to_ipv4_mapped() when normalizing
  IPv6 addresses for CIDR checks, catching both IPv4-mapped (::ffff:x.x)
  AND IPv4-compatible (::x.x) addresses to prevent egress filter bypasses

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
